changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: One-time backfill: rewrite existing orders.link to the canonical form now produced by OrderService.normalizeInstagramUrl, so historical rows share a per-URL quota key with new orders. Mirrors the normalizer's transforms for existing data: strip query/fragment; force https + collapse instagram.com / m.instagram.com to www.instagram.com; rewrite /reel(s)/ to /p/; truncate mobile share tokens to the 11-char shortcode; lowercase the profile handle (usernames are case-insensitive) while leaving the case-SENSITIVE content shortcodes intact; append a trailing slash. Each step is guarded so re-running is a no-op. The earlier per-URL quota (idx_orders_quota_check) split the same target across these variants, letting repeat orders pile onto one link until the bot ran out of fresh accounts and returned PARTIAL/CANCELLED.
